modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't track my order from the bookstore website.

full_description_text:  
I was trying to check the status of my order on the bookstore website, you know, the one at https://usd.textbookx.com. But for some reason, I just can't seem to track it at all. I clicked around and nothing happened, and it’s really frustrating because I want to know where my books are. It’s like I’m in the dark about my order, and I just need to find out what’s going on!
